description: Hennessey's all-American 311mph hypercar to demolish the competition, but only time will tell how it stacks up against the blistering speeds of the competition. The Texan-based hypercar is packed with easter eggs too, from the key fob containing metal from a space shuttle launch to the F5 name itself being a reference to the F5 tornado, the highest rating on the Fujita scale.
creator: DodgeDemon
